scope: Slice 4.1 adversarial sequences (4-5 problems/persona), not yet the full 50-problem matrix
note: Live run of the chat baseline self-assessment (MASTERED/NOT_YET). Pre-registered prediction was 4-5/5; actual 2/5 — the chat tutor denied the personas who give visibly wrong answers (Sam, Nate, Cleo) and over-claimed only for the right-answer-without-understanding personas (Hugo, Priya). See RESEARCH.md §9.
